title: Synaptic cleft segmentation in non-isotropic volume electron microscopy of the complete Drosophila brain
abstract: We present a method for detecting synaptic clefts in anisotropic volume EM data of the complete Drosophila brain, addressing the challenge that standard 3D approaches fail on non-isotropic data.
notes: Already in existing 102. Funke is key methods contributor.
